name: Catherine Russell
abstract: Catherine Russell (born 1956) is an American jazz and blues singer. She is best known for her 2016 album Harlem on My Mind and for touring with David Bowie and Steely Dan.

interviews.title: Catherine Russell interviewed by Monk Rowe, Utica, New York, October 26, 2018

about_quotes.speaker: Ametria Dock
about_quotes.evidence: I was able to have a conversation with Catherine Russell a couple of months ago and she talked about how being a back-up singer is not for everybody.
about_quotes.doc_title: Ametria Dock interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clinton, New York, April 4, 2019

about_quotes.speaker: Hentoff Nat
about_quotes.evidence: Catherine Russell, who just made me feel so good I had to write about her.
